subject: Remove logback and bump up the clamp version
commit_message:
Remove logback and bump up the clamp version

Remove the logback file not used anymore and bump up clamp version

Issue-ID: CLAMP-812
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: Ic3576039df21eb8aa27064188c56c0117aea1ceb
